narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp H (precinct in Summit County) has 879 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
